name: High up in a tree
description:
You are now very near the top of the tree.  This is where people come to see
Galadriel.  Looking out from the flet you are able to view a considerable
portion of the lands around you, and it doesn't look pretty.  Your immediate
surroundings, on the other hand, are absolutely beautiful.  Of course, you
would expect no less from someone as important as Galadriel.  There are several
wooden benches that look quite comfortable, and you imagine this is where her
guests sit.  In the center of the flet are two chairs, highly decorated and
very expensive-looking.  This must be where Galadriel and Celeborn sit while
holding an audience.  The whole place is decorated with flowers and other
plants, giving you the feeling that you are in the middle of a garden rather
then on top of a tree.  The stairs from which you entered from lead back down
to the waiting area.
